name: Sour Cream Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 3/4 cups Sifted cake or pastry flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Add water to chocolate and simmer while stirring until thick, then cool.
2. Blend shortening and salt, add sugar, and cream thoroughly.
3. Beat in eggs.
4. Add sifted flour and baking soda alternately with the sour cream, mixing well.
5. Stir in melted chocolate, ensuring a smooth mixture.
6. Bake in a greased pan in a moderate oven at 350°F (175°C) for about 45 minutes or until tested done.
7. Frost with your favorite frosting.
